features.name: tranif0 primitive with inout and control signal
features.description: Code should include a tranif0 primitive instantiation with an inout port, a control signal, and a data signal

features.name: tranif1 primitive with inout and control signal
features.description: Code should include a tranif1 primitive instantiation with an inout port, a control signal, and a data signal

features.name: multi-stage tranif network with signal cascade
features.description: Code should include multiple cascaded tranif0/tranif1 primitives where output of one feeds input of another, creating a multi-stage network

features.name: supply0 and supply1 constants driving tranif
features.description: Code should include supply0 and supply1 constants connected to tranif primitives as control or pass-through signals

features.name: inout port connected to tranif primitive
features.description: Code should include an inout port on a module that connects directly to a tranif primitive for bidirectional signal passing

extraction_summary.note: Original tool iverilog remapped to verilator for schema compliance
